categorytree-desc: Si firfircoon u dhex mara [[Special:CategoryTree|qaab-dhismeedka qaybta]]
categorytree-header: Geli magaca qaybta si aad u aragto waxa ku jira qaab-dhismeed geed. (Waxay u baahan tahay JavaScript.)
categorytree-member-counts: Waxay ka koobantahay{{PLURAL:$1|1 qayb hoosaad|$1 qaybo hoosaad}}, {{PLURAL:$2|1 bog|$2 boggag}}, iyo {{PLURAL:$3|1 feyl|$3feylal}}
categorytree-no-subcategories: Ma jiraan wax laamaha qaybaha ah
categorytree-no-pages: bogag ama qaybo hoosaadyo ma jiraan
categorytree-error: Dhibaato ku timid soo dejinta xogta.
categorytree-retry: Fadlan sug in yar oo isku day mar kale.
categorytree-onlyroot-message: [https://phabricator.wikimedia.org/T290062 T290062]: Parameter onlyroot waa la joojiyay. Isticmaal depth="0" beddelkeeda.
categorytree-deprecation-warning: '''Digniin:''' Boggan wuxuu adeegsadaa oo leh halbeeg aan la isticmaalin.
categorytree-deprecation-category: Bogagga isticmaalaya xuduudaha qaybta ee aan la isticmaalin
